# Your Company Landscaping and Construction

> Landscaping, hardscaping, and snow removal company serving homeowners across Your Area. One local crew, four-season service, free estimates.

## Contact

- Phone / text: 555-555-5555
- Email: hello@example.com
- Service area: Town One, Town Two, Town Three, Town Four, Town Five, and Town Six, plus surrounding Your Area
- Website: https://example.com/

## Services

- Lawn maintenance — weekly and biweekly mowing, edging, and trimming
- Spring & fall cleanups — leaf removal, bed prep, seasonal cutbacks
- Sod installation — fresh sod for an instant, healthy lawn
- Mulch & garden beds — mulch delivery, bed installation, and edging
- Paver patios & walkways — paver and stone hardscaping
- Driveways — paver and Belgian block driveways, aprons, and edging
- Pools — pool decking, paver surrounds, and backyard pool landscaping
- Landscape installation — full design, planting, and grading
- Snow removal — residential plowing and salting all winter
